zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Woodhouse於1495年出生在英國諾福爾可吉波利時，她的父親Sir Thomas Woodhouse18歲，母親Thomasine Townsend20歲。她於1512年4月與Robert Coke在英國英格蘭諾福爾可米列哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭布里斯托聖 詹姆斯 馮 雷也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Woodhouse于1495年出生在英国諾福爾可吉波利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Woodhouse18岁，母亲Thomasine Townsend20岁。她于1512年4月与Robert Coke在英国英格兰諾福爾可米列哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰布里斯托聖 詹姆斯 馮 雷也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Woodhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places (in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Yorkshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, and elsewhere) called Woodhouse, or a topographic name for someone who lived at a ‘house in the wood’ (Middle English wode, hous, Old English wudu, hūs).

variant of Woodiwiss , from Middle English wodewose, which by the 16th century was sometimes written as wodowes, woodose, and wodehouse. The confusion with woodhouse probably arose because both words (and both names) were pronounced /wudus/ or /wudǝs/ in local dialect.

variants.name: Woodis
meanings: perhaps a nickname from Old English wuduwāsa‘faun, satyr’.
alternatively, a shortened form of   Woodhouse  .

variants.name: Woodiwiss
meanings: English (mainly Derbyshire and Yorkshire): nickname from Middle English wodewose, wodewese (Old English wudewāse) ‘wild man of the woods’. This word was also used to denote a person dressed to represent such a being in a play or pageant. Wodewoses (male and female) were mythical creatures of English and ancient Germanic folklore, akin to the fauns and satyrs of Classical mythology. The surname may also have been acquired by someone who lived and worked in the woods or perhaps by an unusually hairy man.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Woodhouse was born in 1495, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Thomas Woodhouse, was 18 and her mother, Thomasine Townsend, was 20. She married Robert Coke in April 1512, in Mileham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1540, at the age of 45, and was buried in St James The Less' Church, Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Woodhouse est née en 1495, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Woodhouse, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Townsend, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Coke en avril 1512, à Mileham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à St James The Less' Church, Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Woodhouse 1495 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Woodhouse 18 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Townsend 20. Sie hat im April 1512 in Mileham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Robert Coke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 45 Jahren und wurde in St James The Less' Church, Bristol, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Woodhouse è nata il nel 1495 nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Woodhouse, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Townsend, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Robert Coke nel aprile 1512, nel Mileham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1540, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a St James The Less' Church, Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St James, Bristol, England: 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨 스트 자메스 테 레스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Ann Woodhouse(이)가 1495년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Woodhouse(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Townsend(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1512년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 마일레함에서 Robert Coke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨 스트 자메스 테 레스' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Woodhouse nasceu em 1495, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Woodhouse, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Townsend, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Coke em abril de 1512, em Mileham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em St James The Less' Church, Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St James, Bristol, England: ст джемесь т лесс' чурч, бристол, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Woodhouse родилась в 1495 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Woodhouse было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Townsend, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Coke апрель 1512 г. в местности милэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1540 г. в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джемесь т лесс' чурч, бристол, Англия, Великобритания.
